description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 1 / section 3. Lower / earlier observation thresholds and smaller observation chunks**.

Goal: choose materially earlier defaults and add regressions that prove long turns are handled by multiple smaller passes rather than one very-late giant dump.

Relevant code/test surfaces:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/config.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/README.md` config docs if defaults or knobs change
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/integration/observation-cycle-threshold.test.ts`
- related extension/integration coverage for long runs

Worker notes:
- make the default shift meaningful, not merely cosmetic
- keep the package affordable/conservative enough for real use
- assertions should demonstrate behavior change, not just changed numbers in config
title: Tune earlier OM defaults and add regressions against giant late-pass extraction
